app.title: Codex Reset Watcher
refresh.slowHint: Real data sources can take a few seconds. Please wait.
field.notProvided: Not provided by the current data source
rec.creditExpiringSoon: {count} reset credit(s) will expire within 3 days. Use them soon.
rec.sessionWindowLow: Only {percent}% of the 5-hour window remains. Watch your usage.
rec.weeklyWindowLow: Only {percent}% of the 7-day window remains. This week is tight.
rec.fetchFailed: Failed to read data. The view may be cached or incomplete. Check config or retry.
rec.allGood: All good. Nothing needs your attention right now.
error.parse: Failed to parse data: the response is not valid JSON.
error.timeout: The data source call timed out.
debug.title: Debug information
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure the local data source, refresh cadence, and interface preferences.
settings.testSuccess: Data source connected; valid JSON detected
settings.testBlockedByRefresh: Data is refreshing now. Please wait for refresh to finish before testing the connection.
settings.testError.success: Data source connected; valid JSON detected
settings.testError.refresh_in_progress: Data is refreshing now. Please wait for refresh to finish before testing the connection.
settings.testError.python_missing: Python executable not found. Check the path.
settings.testError.script_missing: Script file not found. Check the path.
settings.testError.exec_failed: Script execution failed. Check Python and the script.
settings.testError.timeout: Data source call timed out (5 seconds).
settings.testError.unrecognized_structur: Unrecognized JSON structure. Confirm this is Codex-Usage output.
settings.testError.unknown: Connection test failed. Check your settings and retry.
settings.testError.probe_failed: Probe failed. Check whether the source is available.
settings.mockHint: For UI troubleshooting and QA only. Does not show real quota.
settings.candidateListHint: Candidate list is for advanced troubleshooting; ordinary users can keep auto-detect.
source.needsLogin: No usable Codex login was detected.
source.needsLoginHint: Please sign in to Codex on this computer, make sure Codex works normally, then return here and refresh.
source.authExpiredHint: Please sign in to Codex on this computer, make sure Codex works normally, then return here and refresh.
source.networkError: Could not reach the Codex API.
source.networkErrorHint: Check your network, then refresh. You usually do not need Python or Codex-Usage.
source.detectFailed: Local Codex usage status not detected
source.detectFailedHint: If Codex is already signed in on this PC, you usually do not need Codex-Usage or Python. Re-detect, or open the data source guide.
source.useMockAdvanced: Advanced: use demo data to check the UI
source.mockNotRealQuota: Demo data is for UI troubleshooting only and does not show real quota.
source.mockBanner: Demo data is active and does not show real quota. Switch back to Auto-detect in Settings.
empty.title: Welcome to Codex Reset Watcher
empty.subtitle: Windows users signed into Codex usually need no setup:
empty.step2: The app reads local Codex login status and shows real quota
empty.step3: If detection fails, re-detect or use Advanced options
empty.mockHint: Demo data is only in Advanced options for UI troubleshooting and is not real quota.
errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: The app hit an unexpected error. You can reload to continue.
nav.label: Primary navigation
settings.dndAllowUrgent: Allow urgent expiry alerts during do not disturb
settings.saveError.autostart: Startup registration could not be changed. Your other settings were kept.
settings.saveError.window: The window setting could not be applied. Please retry.
settings.saveError.notification: Notification settings could not be applied. Please retry.
settings.saveError.general: Settings could not be saved. Please retry.
history.title: History & trends
history.insufficientDetail: At least two valid snapshots spanning five minutes are required.
history.basis: Based on {count} valid local snapshots over about {hours} hours.
history.localEstimate: Local estimate only; this is not an official OpenAI conclusion.
history.noCreditRisk: No reset credit is currently within the warning window.
history.demoExcluded: Demo snapshots are marked and excluded from real forecasts.
history.clearConfirm: Clear all local quota history? This cannot be undone.
notification.creditExpiry.title: Reset credit expiring soon
notification.creditExpiry.body: A reset credit expires in about {hours} hours. Consider using it for useful work.
notification.windowRecovered.title: Usage window recovered
notification.depletionRisk.title: Usage may run out early
notification.depletionRisk.body: At the recent local rate, the {window} window may be depleted before reset.
notification.refreshFailures.title: Quota refresh needs attention
notification.refreshFailures.body: Real data refresh failed {count} times in a row.
notification.sourceFallback.title: Data source fallback active
notification.sourceFallback.body: The app switched to {source}; current data may be incomplete.
rec.sourceFallbackRule: Source health triggered this suggestion: {source} is a fallback, so verify the data before planning heavy work.
rec.historyInsufficient: History rule: there are not yet two valid snapshots spanning five minutes, so no trend advice is shown.
rec.creditAction: Expiry rule: {count} credit(s) expire within 24 hours; prioritize useful review or test work.
rec.recentRateHigh: Usage rule: the last 24 hours are above the recent 7-day daily average; consider pacing larger tasks.
rec.fiveHourTightAction: Forecast rule: the 5-hour window is being consumed; consider waiting for recovery before a large refactor.
